name: frontier_tower
description: Battle Tower hall end-to-end (q.side_frontier_hall stage 1): Climber Jasper -> Contender Mira -> Tower Tycoon Palmer under dev-bot autobattle, then the beaten lane. Same shape as frontier_pyramid: champion arm (royal_league_champion, stripped at cleanup), Palmer's button gating on both challenger tags is the gate assert, on_win fires frontier/hall_cleared ('A Frontier hall falls.' + #halls recount), and the preamble strips the OTHER six hall tags + frontier_warden_stirred so '#halls==1 / warden not stirred' holds. Neither the one_time challengers nor the gym_leader brain despawn on win - re-runs are tag surgery only. NOTE Palmer's win_line is verbatim the first sentence of his beaten say[0]; the chat wait and the screen assert are different channels, so no collision. Win waits ride the KNOWN TBCS stall / showdown wedge - a timeout there is almost certainly the stall, re-run before filing.

steps.comment: -- SITE NOTES: latch-placed bodies on the shipped RCT anchors - Jasper [3797.5 159 2959.5], Mira [3803.5 159 2959.5], Palmer [3800.5 159 2962.5]. ALL THREE tower character files carry a PLACEHOLDER-placement warning (atlas-intent facility Battle Tower [4026 64 3068] vs the shipped y=159 plateau anchor, never live-verified) - hence _probe_pending on the tp; do NOT guess a corrected Y. frontier_active region tick suspends Nuzlocke here, but it is NOT a SafeZone - day + regen below for the hardcore player. --
-- reset (idempotent re-runs): this hall's three defeat tags, PLUS the other six hall tags + the warden latch so the aggregate asserts stay exact --
-- gate arm: champion. Stripped again at cleanup --
-- tp BEFORE any entity-adjacent work (latch NPCs spawn within 40b); long settle covers first-visit preset import --
-- leftover-state guards: close any stale dialog; stopbattle force-ends a stale battle (clean-player no-op) --
-- party reset: six empties then two lv-100 Garchomp (ceiling fights; junk parties stall TBCS init; two mons = attrition headroom) --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=100
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon garchomp level=100
execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment: -- settle + lane sanity: band tick re-derives the no_* inverses dropped-side --
-- beat 1: Climber Jasper, ground floor - stable battle-button assert (say[] rotates) --
-- battle buttons have no close action - close the stale dialog; win wait anchors here --

steps.wait_chat: Two floors up. The lift to the Tycoon is open.

steps.comment: -- beat 3: Tower Tycoon Palmer - button gates on both challenger tags; it appearing IS the gate assert --
-- win chain: defeat tag -> Palmer's win line -> frontier/hall_cleared actionbar + #halls recount --

steps.wait_chat: Top floor. There is no promotion above this one

steps.comment: -- beat 4: the beaten lane - priority-20 entry; prose any-of covers all three rotating say lines. Re-find refreshes the approach context (the battle chain pushed the last one out of range) --

expect_screen_text: The chair behind the desk stays mine, but the floor is yours. Take the view in - most people never see the tower from this side.
You reached the summit and held it. I ran this tower back when the Company still built things for people to enjoy instead of things to squeeze them with. Good to see it still means the climb.
The office at the top is yours whenever you want it. Nobody hands out the corner anymore - people just take the stairs. You took them all.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: autobattle off; strip champion + everything this run earned --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
